testcase.name: TutorPutor educator workflows › renders the canonical authoring workspace with publish readiness and analytics panels for a real experience
TutorPutor educator workflows › loads the consolidated admin analytics route with real dashboard visuals
TutorPutor student onboarding › bootstraps the canonical first-sign-in flow and first-visit learner dashboard
TutorPutor student onboarding › guides a newly authenticated learner from dashboard discovery to module exploration
